mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, country_name, university_name, school_tier, gpa_value, major_courses, relevance_level, start_date, end_date, duration_months FROM student_exchange_experience WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_exchange_experience( user_id, country_name, university_name, school_tier, gpa_value, major_courses, relevance_level, start_date, end_date, duration_months ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{countryName}, #{universityName}, #{schoolTier}, #{gpaValue}, #{majorCourses}, #{relevanceLevel}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{durationMonths} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE country_name = VALUES(country_name), university_name = VALUES(university_name), school_tier = VALUES(school_tier), gpa_value = VALUES(gpa_value), major_courses = VALUES(major_courses), relevance_level = VALUES(relevance_level), start_date = VALUES(start_date), end_date = VALUES(end_date), duration_months = VALUES(duration_months)
